name: Grade 1 Gardening — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 1 pathway for plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation. Learning builds independence through investigation, guided practice, application, and reflection.
learningGoals: Develop first-grade knowledge and skills in plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation.
Use speaking, drawing, writing, numbers, models, or movement to explain thinking.
Work independently when ready and ask for help, feedback, or clarification when needed.

lessons.title: Explore plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

lessons.title: Practice plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

resources.title: NAAEE environmental education guidelines
resources.description: Planning reference for this Grade 1 Gardening pathway.

units.title: Investigate: plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation
units.essentialQuestion: What evidence can we gather about plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation?
outcomes: I can observe, discuss, and record plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation.
I can use accurate words, pictures, numbers, models, writing, or movement to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Explore plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation
lessons.objective: I can observe, discuss, and record plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation by completing a first-grade task and explaining one observation, choice, or strategy.

activities.title: Notice and investigate
activities.learnerAction: The learner uses age-appropriate materials and first-grade vocabulary to observe, discuss, and record plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation. Adult supervision is provided whenever the subject involves tools, heat, animals, water, traffic, or online media.

successCriteria: The learner completes a first-grade task connected to plant structures, soil, weather, seed care, and garden observation.
The learner explains an observation, choice, or strategy with appropriate support.
The learner follows safety, care, and collaboration expectations.
